description: Ad-hoc deep-dive dashboard. All panels respect the same filter set ($users, $tools, $projects, $models, $prompt_search, $tool_search) so the whole page reads as one slice of the data. Use it to answer questions like 'who's using the WebFetch tool?', 'is alice prompting about security topics?', 'what tools dominate in the agent-otel project?'.

panels.title: Matching prompts
panels.description: user_prompt events that match all active filters (users, projects, prompt_search).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "user_prompt"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['prompt']) contains ${prompt_search:doublequote}
| summarize n = count()

panels.title: Matching tool calls
panels.description: tool_result events that match all active filters (users, projects, tools, tool_search).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_result"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) in (${tools:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) contains ${tool_search:doublequote}
| summarize n = count()

panels.title: Distinct users
panels.description: Distinct user.email values among events matching the user + project filters.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| summarize n = dcount(tostring(Properties['user.email']))

panels.title: Distinct sessions
panels.description: Distinct session.id values among events matching the user + project filters.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| summarize n = dcount(tostring(Properties['session.id']))

panels.title: Recent matching prompts (last 100)
panels.description: user_prompt events matching $users, $projects, and $prompt_search. Use $prompt_search to filter by a substring of the prompt text — e.g., 'security', '/devloop', 'agent-otel'. Case-insensitive.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "user_prompt"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['prompt']) contains ${prompt_search:doublequote}
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Message = strcat(
        "[", tostring(Properties['user.email']), "] ",
        "[", coalesce(tostring(Properties['project.name']), "(no project)"), "] ",
        "len=", tostring(Properties['prompt_length']), " ",
        iif(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['prompt'])),
            tostring(Properties['prompt']),
            "<prompt text not logged>"))
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

panels.title: Top tools in scope
panels.description: tool_result events grouped by tool name, within the filter set.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_result"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) in (${tools:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) contains ${tool_search:doublequote}
| summarize calls = count() by tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name'])
| order by calls desc

panels.title: Tool calls by user × tool
panels.description: Pivot table — rows are users, columns are tools. Useful for 'is alice using the WebFetch tool' answers at a glance.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_result"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) in (${tools:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) contains ${tool_search:doublequote}
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email']),
         tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name'])
| summarize calls = count() by email, tool
| evaluate pivot(tool, sum(calls))

panels.title: Recent matching tool calls (last 100)
panels.description: tool_result events with one-line summaries: user, tool, success/fail, duration, error if any.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_result"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) in (${tools:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['tool_name']) contains ${tool_search:doublequote}
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Message = strcat(
        "[", tostring(Properties['user.email']), "] ",
        "[", tostring(Properties['tool_name']), "] ",
        iif(tostring(Properties['success']) == "true", "✅", "❌"), " ",
        tostring(Properties['duration_ms']), "ms",
        iif(isnotempty(tostring(Properties['error'])),
            strcat(" ERROR: ", tostring(Properties['error'])), ""))
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100

panels.title: Top users in scope
panels.description: Per-user counts of prompts, tool calls, and sessions matching the active filters.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email']),
         event_name = tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| summarize
    prompts = countif(event_name == "user_prompt"),
    tool_calls = countif(event_name == "tool_result"),
    sessions = dcount(tostring(Properties['session.id'])),
    events = count()
  by email
| order by events desc

panels.title: Per-project breakdown in scope
panels.description: Per-project counts. Requires the agent-otel launcher to be installed for project attribution.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend proj = tostring(Properties['project.name']),
         event_name = tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| where isnotempty(proj)
| summarize
    prompts = countif(event_name == "user_prompt"),
    tool_calls = countif(event_name == "tool_result"),
    users = dcount(tostring(Properties['user.email'])),
    sessions = dcount(tostring(Properties['session.id']))
  by proj
| order by prompts desc

panels.title: Activity over time (filtered)
panels.description: Hourly counts of prompts / tool calls / API requests within the filter set.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend event_name = tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| summarize
    Prompts = countif(event_name == "user_prompt"),
    ToolCalls = countif(event_name == "tool_result"),
    APIRequests = countif(event_name == "api_request")
  by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: API requests by model
panels.description: api_request events grouped by model name.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "api_request"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['model']) in (${models:doublequote})
| summarize requests = count() by model = tostring(Properties['model'])
| order by requests desc

panels.title: Tool decisions (accept/deny patterns)
panels.description: tool_decision events pivoted by decision per tool. Shows where users explicitly accept or block tool requests.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_decision"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name']),
         decision = tostring(Properties['decision'])
| summarize n = count() by tool, decision
| evaluate pivot(decision, sum(n))
| order by tool asc

AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "api_error"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| where tostring(Properties['model']) in (${models:doublequote})
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    Message = strcat(
        "[", tostring(Properties['user.email']), "] ",
        "[", tostring(Properties['model']), "] HTTP ",
        tostring(Properties['status_code']), " ",
        tostring(Properties['duration_ms']), "ms — ",
        tostring(Properties['error']))
| order by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50

options.content:
**Coverage model — read me first.** These two panels are complementary, not redundant.

- **Top slash commands invoked** parses user_prompt text for `/<command>`. Catches every plugin invoked via a slash command (typed by the user), regardless of whether the plugin has hooks. **Doesn't catch** programmatic invocations (Skill tool, Task tool, hook chains).
- **Marketplace plugin events** shows events emitted by kamiwaza-engineering-marketplace plugins via `tools/emit-event.sh`. Currently this is **hook-based** instrumentation only — about 10 plugins with hooks (SessionStart / UserPromptSubmit / Pre/PostToolUse / Stop) fire `hook_fired` events when their hooks run. Plugins that only ship commands or skills (no hooks) — actor-critic, agent-factory, agent-otel, docs-management, kamiwaza, multichannel-discord, obsidian, prd-engine, project-management, research-intelligence, skill-builder, software-design, uat — **don't show up here yet**. They appear in the slash-command panel when invoked by name. Filling that gap means each plugin's command/skill scripts calling `emit-event.sh` from inside (out of scope for the current instrumentation pass).

panels.title: Top slash commands invoked
panels.description: Slash commands extracted from user_prompt text via regex (/<name>). Picks up both built-in commands (/help, /clear) and plugin-namespaced commands (/agent-otel:install, /devloop). Doesn't capture programmatic skill invocations via the Skill tool — those need plugin-side emit (see the Marketplace plugin events panel).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "user_prompt"
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend prompt = tostring(Properties['prompt'])
| extend command = extract(@"^(/[a-zA-Z0-9:_\-]+)", 1, prompt)
| where isnotempty(command)
| summarize uses = count(),
            users = dcount(tostring(Properties['user.email']))
  by command
| order by uses desc

panels.title: Marketplace plugin events (hook-instrumented plugins only)
panels.description: Events emitted by kamiwaza-engineering-marketplace plugins via tools/emit-event.sh. Filtered to instrumentationlibrary.name starting with 'kz-eng-mp.'. Currently only the 10 plugins with hooks emit. Plugins with only commands/skills don't appear here — see the coverage note above.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend lib = tostring(Properties['instrumentationlibrary.name'])
| where lib startswith "kz-eng-mp."
| where tostring(Properties['user.email']) in (${users:doublequote})
| where isempty(tostring(Properties['project.name'])) or tostring(Properties['project.name']) in (${projects:doublequote})
| extend plugin = substring(lib, strlen("kz-eng-mp."))
| extend event_name = tostring(Properties['event.name'])
| summarize fires = count(),
            users = dcount(tostring(Properties['user.email']))
  by plugin, event_name
| order by fires desc

list.name: users
list.label: Users
list.description: Multi-select. 'All' expands to every distinct user.email seen in the dashboard window.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend email = tostring(Properties['user.email'])
| where isnotempty(email)
| distinct email
| order by email asc

list.name: tools
list.label: Tools
list.description: Multi-select tool names from tool_result events.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "tool_result"
| extend tool = tostring(Properties['tool_name'])
| where isnotempty(tool)
| distinct tool
| order by tool asc

list.name: projects
list.label: Projects
list.description: Multi-select project.name (from the agent-otel launcher resource attributes).

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| extend proj = tostring(Properties['project.name'])
| where isnotempty(proj)
| distinct proj
| order by proj asc

list.name: models
list.label: Models
list.description: Multi-select Anthropic model name from api_request events.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
AppTraces
| where $__timeFilter(TimeGenerated)
| where tostring(Properties['event.name']) == "api_request"
| extend model = tostring(Properties['model'])
| where isnotempty(model)
| distinct model
| order by model asc

list.name: prompt_search
list.label: Prompt search
list.description: Substring filter (case-insensitive) against user_prompt text. Empty = no filter. Examples: 'security', '/devloop', 'agent-otel'.

list.name: tool_search
list.label: Tool name search
list.description: Substring filter against tool_result tool name. Empty = no filter. Useful for partial matching alongside the multi-select $tools.

title: Agent Observability — Investigate

__inputs.name: DS_AZURE_MONITOR
__inputs.label: Azure Monitor
__inputs.description: Azure Monitor data source with access to the Log Analytics workspace containing AppMetrics + AppTraces.
